detail: Automatically scraped from SoundImports (scraped via soundimports.eu). T/S parameters have not been verified by a human against the datasheet.
corrections: Mms corrected 2.1e-5->0.021 kg; Sd corrected 2.2e-6->0.022 m2; Cms corrected 1.3->0.0013 m/N (same unit detection fixes as 10BR60V2); Pe corrected 100->50W (SI published program power as RMS; PDF confirms 50 WRMS); confirmed against Beyma 8BR40/N datasheet PDF
